title: Add Dimensions to Aggregate Filters in Streamlit App
story: As a data analyst using the Streamlit app, I want to add both dimensions and measures to aggregate filters so that I can build more comprehensive analytical queries.
description: Currently the aggregate filter functionality only allows adding measures. The Datameer app reference implementation also adds dimensions in aggregate filters. This task extends the aggregate filter to support both dimensions and measures, matching the expected analytics UX pattern.
acceptance_criteria: Dimensions can be added to aggregate filters alongside measures
Dimension filters apply group-by logic correctly
Existing measure-only filters continue to work
Filter UI matches the Datameer reference pattern
ux_changes: Aggregate filter UI expanded to allow selecting dimensions in addition to measures.
middleware_changes: Query builder updated to handle dimension-based filters in aggregate queries.
